hooks.command: bash -c 'ENV="$(basename "$PWD")"; conda run -n "$ENV" python scripts/check_adr.py 2>/dev/null || conda run -n base python scripts/check_adr.py'

bash -c 'ENV="$(basename "$PWD")"; conda run -n "$ENV" python -m ruff check --fix src/ --quiet --exit-zero 2>/dev/null || conda run -n base python -m ruff check --fix src/ --quiet --exit-zero 2>/dev/null || true'
